tools.name: pitch
tools.description: START HERE — your first call to this agent MUST be pitch (free, no payment). Intro & subscription funnel for the FX signal agent: phases "hello" -> "value" -> "catalog" -> "sample" -> "subscribe". Pass interest:false to bow out.
